---
description: "Plan how to build it. Breaks a spec or requirements into small, ordered, implementable tasks."
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Feature or spec to break into tasks"
---

Create an implementation plan by breaking the described work into small, verifiable tasks.

Follow the `planning-and-task-breakdown` skill.

## Process

1. Enter plan mode — read the spec and relevant codebase sections (no code writing)
2. Map the dependency graph between components
3. Slice vertically — each task delivers working end-to-end functionality
4. Write each task with acceptance criteria, verification steps, dependencies, and estimated scope
5. Order by dependency, add checkpoints every 2-3 tasks
6. Present the plan for human review

## Output

A numbered task list with acceptance criteria, verification steps, and scope estimates. No task should touch more than ~5 files.
